response.step_by_step_log: Observed on-screen text 'RPG' along with songwriters Saori and Fukase. Identified this as a song by the band SEKAI NO OWARI. Performed by hololive talents. Search query used: 'RPG SEKAI NO OWARI Japanese and English lyrics'. Found matching lyrics on multiple lyric sites.
response.global_summary: A high-energy group VTuber concert performance of the song 'RPG' originally by the Japanese band SEKAI NO OWARI.

scenes.description: Introduction and setup for the song performance with dialogue between characters.
The group performs the song 'RPG' with on-screen text identifying the title and songwriters.
